input.question: Which buildings are used by which departments?

payload.question: Which buildings are used by which departments?

output.sql:
SELECT
  b.id AS building_id,
  b.name AS building_name,
  COALESCE(STRING_AGG(d.name, ', ' ORDER BY d.name), '') AS department_list,
  COUNT(d.id) AS department_count
FROM buildings b
LEFT JOIN departments d ON d.building_id = b.id
GROUP BY b.id, b.name
ORDER BY b.name;

visualization.description: Which buildings are used by which departments
visualization.title: Departments per Building

payload.sql:
SELECT
  b.id AS building_id,
  b.name AS building_name,
  COALESCE(STRING_AGG(d.name, ', ' ORDER BY d.name), '') AS department_list,
  COUNT(d.id) AS department_count
FROM buildings b
LEFT JOIN departments d ON d.building_id = b.id
GROUP BY b.id, b.name
ORDER BY b.name;
